title: Polish Floral Delight
description: A light and refreshing Polish-inspired dish featuring floral flavors and crunchy radish.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together radish slices and floral honey until well combined.
2. Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
3. Place 2 slices of rye bread on the panini press and top each slice with a dollop of light cream cheese.
4. Spoon the radish and floral honey mixture on top of the cream cheese.
5. Add a sprinkle of chopped fresh dill on top.
6. Place the remaining 2 slices of rye bread on top to complete the sandwich.
7. Grill the sandwich for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is toasted and the cream cheese is melted.
